description_long: This is a large, industrial-style dumpster with a robust rectangular body and a domed, hinged lid featuring two circular openings for waste disposal. The dumpster is equipped with four heavy-duty caster wheels for mobility, and prominent side handles designed for manual maneuvering or mechanical lifting. The exterior is primarily metallic, with a smooth, hard surface and a matte finish, and it features a visible recycling label on one side. The lid appears to be split into two sections, each with its own opening, and is likely made of the same metal as the body. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor urban environments, such as streets, alleys, or commercial areas.
description: A large, wheeled metal dumpster with a domed, split lid featuring two circular waste openings and side handles for maneuvering. It has a recycling label and is designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the open lid, recycling label, and prominent side handles.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the domed lid with two circular openings and the rear handles.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the domed lid, circular openings, and the overall rectangular footprint.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the closed lid, side handles, and the recycling label on the front.
attribute_lid_type: domed, split, hinged metal lid with two circular openings and visible hinge mechanism
attribute_handle_design: Four large, bar-shaped metal handles located on each side and rear of the dumpster
